name: Cannoli-1
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Marsala wine (or sherry or sweet white wine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and sugar with butter. Gradually add beaten egg and wine; form mixture into a ball.
2. Knead dough until smooth (about 5 minutes). Cover and let stand at least 1 hour.
3. For the filling: Press ricotta cheese through a sieve into a mixing bowl. Add confectioner's sugar, reserving 2 tablespoons.
4. Stir in chopped candied fruit with cherries and chocolate chips. Chill in refrigerator.
5. On a floured surface, roll dough into paper-thin rounds about 4 inches in diameter.
6. Wrap each round around cannoli tubes (5-inch-long metal cylinders, 1 inch in diameter) that have been brushed with olive oil. Brush egg white on the flap to seal.
7. Heat oil to 380°F and deep fry dough until golden brown. Drain on several layers of paper towels.
8. Cool slightly, then carefully slide out the cannoli tubes.
9. When ready to serve (dough should not become soggy), pipe filling through the largest nozzle of a pastry bag. Place chocolate chips in the ends of each tube.
10. Dust with remaining confectioner's sugar and serve immediately.
Serves 6-8. Cannoli tubes can be purchased at most kitchen supply stores.
